fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases retain exact face counts. The authored and peak-height cases now also have exact vertex counts (11,971 / 11,199) after restoring the guide curve's Blender float32 control points and preserving the already-normalized Curve to Points tangent instead of normalizing it a second time. Together those changes reduce the authored Geometry Proximity distance RMS error from 1.96e-6 to 1.08e-6 and make the authored 1e-5 threshold weld exact. Pure String to Curves geometry keeps Blender's implicit curve-radius bounds for the marching grid, while mixed mesh/font diagnostics use positional font bounds. Before Merge by Distance, topology remains exact at 16,567 vertices / 11,199 faces. The wider sweep is still near-exact: edited text is +6 vertices, line thickness is +2, and subdivide 12 is -5, with exact faces; maximum rounded bounds error is 0.1327 units. Those residuals remain localized to proximity-driven marching interpolation and threshold weld pairs rather than Merge by Distance semantics.
